_comment: Migration rules for ashlrcode settings.json. Each entry describes a key rename or transform from a prior version to v1.0.

migrations.description: ashlrcode uses camelCase baseURL — snake_case base_url is silently ignored
Inline api_key deprecated — use apiKeyEnvVar pointing to an env var name
Top-level model key replaced by providers.primary.model in v0.8+
Renamed from snake_case mcp_servers to camelCase mcpServers
disable_permissions renamed to dangerouslySkipPermissions for clarity
